failures.description: No agent failure detected; the trajectory matches the user goal and is grounded in the tool output.
failures.checklist_reasoning: No failure is evident in the trajectory. The user asked for the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The agent searched Electric Kettle products sorted by ascending price, included availability data, then selected the first available item from the returned results. The tool output shows item_id 1240311797 is available and priced at 137.17, which is the lowest price in the sorted list and satisfies the availability constraint.
